creator: basil@vpm.net.ua
text:
portname have lowercase letters (sysutils/ldap-account-manager) , package  
name have capitalised letters (LDAP-Account-Manager).
package name  renamed to ldap-account-manager and now equivalent port name.

update tested

Pless commit the port.

&& /usr/bin/tar -C docs/devel -cf - . | /usr/bin/tar xf - -C  
/usr/local/www/lam/html
cd  
/usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/work/ldap-account-manager-2.2.0  
&& /usr/bin/tar cf - locale | /usr/bin/tar xf - -C /usr/local/www/lam
===> Setting correct permissions
   To use LDAP-account-manager, you have to install
   and set up Samba 2.x or 3.x schemas.
   Like this :
      include       /usr/local/etc/openldap/schema/core.schema
      include       /usr/local/etc/openldap/schema/cosine.schema
      include       /usr/local/etc/openldap/schema/inetorgperson.schema
      include       /usr/local/etc/openldap/schema/nis.schema
      include       /usr/local/etc/openldap/schema/samba.schema
